resources.string: Tap the + button to add one.

## About SSH Remote
SSH Remote allows you to control your computer remotely using SSH. You can define custom commands or use presets for common tasks.

## Getting Started
1. Add a new host by tapping the + button.
2. Enter your SSH connection details.
3. Select a preset (e.g., xdotool for Linux X11, wtype for Linux Wayland) to auto-configure remote control buttons.

## Remote Control
Once connected, you can use the remote control interface to send commands. You can customize the layout and commands by editing the remote control settings.
